languages.original_text: "Shereen, you know I've never been afraid of a fight. But even the thought of us having to go into that thing's lair gives me a bad feeling... Wouldn't it be simpler to just hit it with a targeted salvo from orbit?"

languages.text: "Шерин, вы знаете, я никогда не боялась драки. Но от мысли, что нам придется залезть в логово этой твари, мне не по себе... Возможно, его будет проще наградить метким залпом с орбиты?"
languages.translation_comment: before the battle with the eerie fauna of the frontier world

languages.text: "Shereen, you know I've never been afraid of a fight. But even the thought of us having to go into that thing's lair gives me a bad feeling... Wouldn't it be simpler to just hit it with a targeted salvo from orbit?"

"Shereen, you know I've never been afraid of a fight. But even the thought of us having to go into that thing's lair gives me a bad feeling... Wouldn't it be simpler to just hit it with a targeted salvo from orbit?"

languages.text: 「シェリーン、わかっているだろうが、私は今まで一度も戦いを恐れたことはない。しかし、私たちがその怪物に巣窟に侵入せざるをえなくなるという考えだけで、私は不吉な予感に襲われる...軌道上から狙いを定めて一斉射撃するほうが、もっと簡単では？」
languages.original_text: "Shereen, you know I've never been afraid of a fight. But even the thought of us having to go into that thing's lair gives me a bad feeling... Wouldn't it be simpler to just hit it with a targeted salvo from orbit?"

traits.locale_text: 「シェリーン、わかっているだろうが、私は今まで一度も戦いを恐れたことはない。しかし、私たちがその怪物に巣窟に侵入せざるをえなくなるという考えだけで、私は不吉な予感に襲われる...軌道上から狙いを定めて一斉射撃するほうが、もっと簡単では？」

languages.text: « Shereen, vous savez que je n'ai jamais eu peur de me battre, mais là, j'ai un mauvais pressentiment rien qu'à l'idée de pénétrer dans l'antre de cette chose... Ne serait-il pas plus simple de l'abattre avec une salve ciblée depuis l'orbite ? »
languages.original_text: "Shereen, you know I've never been afraid of a fight. But even the thought of us having to go into that thing's lair gives me a bad feeling... Wouldn't it be simpler to just hit it with a targeted salvo from orbit?"

traits.locale_text: « Shereen, vous savez que je n'ai jamais eu peur de me battre, mais là, j'ai un mauvais pressentiment rien qu'à l'idée de pénétrer dans l'antre de cette chose... Ne serait-il pas plus simple de l'abattre avec une salve ciblée depuis l'orbite ? »

languages.text: "Shereen, Ihr wisst, ich hatte noch vor keinem Kampf Angst. Allerdings habe ich kein gutes Gefühl bei dem Gedanken, den Hort dieses Dings zu betreten ... Wäre es nicht klüger, es einfach mit einer Salve aus dem Orbit anzugreifen?"
languages.original_text: "Shereen, you know I've never been afraid of a fight. But even the thought of us having to go into that thing's lair gives me a bad feeling... Wouldn't it be simpler to just hit it with a targeted salvo from orbit?"

traits.locale_text: "Shereen, Ihr wisst, ich hatte noch vor keinem Kampf Angst. Allerdings habe ich kein gutes Gefühl bei dem Gedanken, den Hort dieses Dings zu betreten ... Wäre es nicht klüger, es einfach mit einer Salve aus dem Orbit anzugreifen?"

languages.text: "Şirinim, kavgadan asla korkmadığımı bilirsin. Fakat o şeyin inine girmek zorunda olduğumuzu düşünmek bile içimi ürpertiyor... Yörüngeden hedefli bir salvoyla vurmak daha kolay olmaz mı?"
languages.original_text: "Shereen, you know I've never been afraid of a fight. But even the thought of us having to go into that thing's lair gives me a bad feeling... Wouldn't it be simpler to just hit it with a targeted salvo from orbit?"

traits.locale_text: "Şirinim, kavgadan asla korkmadığımı bilirsin. Fakat o şeyin inine girmek zorunda olduğumuzu düşünmek bile içimi ürpertiyor... Yörüngeden hedefli bir salvoyla vurmak daha kolay olmaz mı?"

languages.text: «Shereen, ya sabe que nunca me arredro ante una lucha. Pero la mera idea de entrar en el cubil de esa criatura me pone de los nervios... ¿No sería más fácil bombardearla desde la órbita y a otra cosa?».
languages.original_text: "Shereen, you know I've never been afraid of a fight. But even the thought of us having to go into that thing's lair gives me a bad feeling... Wouldn't it be simpler to just hit it with a targeted salvo from orbit?"

traits.locale_text: «Shereen, ya sabe que nunca me arredro ante una lucha. Pero la mera idea de entrar en el cubil de esa criatura me pone de los nervios... ¿No sería más fácil bombardearla desde la órbita y a otra cosa?».

languages.text: “亲爱的，你知道我从不畏惧战斗。可一想到要潜入那怪物的巢穴，我心里就不安……直接从轨道上来一轮精准齐射，不是更干脆利落吗？”
languages.original_text: "Shereen, you know I've never been afraid of a fight. But even the thought of us having to go into that thing's lair gives me a bad feeling... Wouldn't it be simpler to just hit it with a targeted salvo from orbit?"
